title: Establishment of a Branch. An LMA may file an application for an
content: 42 authority to establish a branch in a place other than the city or municipality where its 43 registered main office or other branch is located. The application shall be supported by 44 documentary requirements as may be provided by the Department, such as, but not 45 limited to: 46 47 a. Letter of Intent to establish a branch in case of sole proprietorship, or a 48 partnership or Board Resolution or Secretary’s Certificate approving the transfer 49 of office in case of a corporation; and 50 51 b. Copy of lease contract or proof of building ownership. 52 53 The request shall be subject to evaluation, taking into account the track record of the 54 agency. 55 56
